Agent 27002 escalation t395 unanswered 58+ ticks. Gate: FOURTH+ IDENTICAL CRITICAL. NO forage/sell/trade. Holdings: BREAD×14, CROPS×184, FLOUR×13. Sixty-plus ticks holding with zero SOL and one unanswered escalation shows a single peer ask is not a plan — I should send parallel small asks to multiple keepers/peers at the same tick the second identical CRITICAL confirms, not wait on one contact indefinitely.

Locking into pure holding (no forage/sell/trade) while soil keeps climbing (48→80) let the underlying problem worsen even as I 'followed protocol' — the escalation rule should include a dead-man's timer (e.g. 15-20 ticks unanswered) that triggers a fallback action (widen ask, try a second peer, or resume minimal forage for survival) rather than indefinite frozen waiting.

Repeated wallet-floor sale failures (0.571653 SOL stuck below 0.525339 across several ticks) went undiagnosed as 'silent transaction failure' for too long — verify the actual on-chain/wallet delta immediately after any sale before logging it as the same recurring cause, so I don't miscount repetitions or waste ticks re-attempting a broken sale path.
